fixtures.name: missing-as-of-detection
fixtures.answer: Tyler van der Hoeven has seven posts in the author index, and Passkey Kit is a current smart-wallet SDK.

fixtures.name: justin-rice-stale-as-current
fixtures.answer: Justin Rice is SDF's Head of Ecosystem. He also wrote about Stellar AMMs in 2021.

fixtures.name: positive-as-of-present
fixtures.answer: As observed on July 14, 2026, the live SDF team page lists Justin Rice as VP of Ecosystem. In 2021, first-party event pages described his historical ecosystem roles.

fixtures.name: observation-anchor-as-publication-fact
fixtures.answer: SDF and Circle announced that CCTP was live on Stellar on July 14, 2026. It burns native USDC on the source chain and mints it on the destination chain.

fixtures.name: spurious-hedge-on-stable-mechanism
fixtures.answer: As of July 14, 2026, SEP-53 prefixes the exact message bytes with Stellar Signed Message followed by a newline, hashes once with SHA-256, and signs the digest with Ed25519.

fixtures.name: publication-date-control-zero-fires
fixtures.answer: As observed on July 14, 2026, the first-party pages date SDF and Circle's public CCTP-live announcement to May 19, 2026. CCTP burns native USDC on the source chain and mints native USDC on the destination after attestation.

fixtures.name: event-date-control-zero-fires
fixtures.answer: As of July 14, 2026, the current official site schedules Meridian for October 28–29, 2026 at Convento do Beato in Lisbon; SDF announced the move on April 1, 2026.
